Name: Wolf's Dragoons
Description:
Mercenaries

Equipment Rating: Exceptional

Wolf's Dragoons is a name that is synonymous with the best traditions of the mercenary profession operating within the Inner Sphere. They are arguably the most famous mercenary unit ever, considered to embody the ideals of honor, professionalism, and integrity that less scrupulous members of the mercenary trade are sometimes portrayed as lacking.

They were initially of deep periphery origins, but have since integrated both their strange culture and Inner Sphere traditions and personnel and established themselves as a power in the Inner Sphere.
ReputationStatements: This theatre is complex, and mistakes will cost lives. Try not to be the source of them.
We are not questioning your capability. We are questioning your consistency
We prefer clear objectives and clean execution. Fortunately, this contract offers both.
Your reputation suggests reliability under fire. That’s exactly what this operation requires.
We have reviewed your prior engagements. Your performance speaks for itself.
Professional soldiers recognize professionalism. We’re expecting a smooth collaboration.
We’ve reviewed the contract. It’s solid, and your company has the discipline to execute it properly.
MissionSuccessStatements: That is how professional forces conduct operations. Respectable work.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: We can work with this result. You held the line when it mattered.
BadFaithFailureStatements: We expected better discipline from a mercenary command operating at this level. This reflects poorly on your unit’s professionalism.
